marketBaseline.deVigMethod: proportional normalisation: pA/(pA+pB), both sides' vig-included implied probabilities

priceTimestamps.note: BFO does not publish when the line opened; this price is the market's FIRST price and is used as a logical 'as of market open' prior, not as a wall-clock observation

missingSourceReasons: A: no live multi-book snapshot supplied
